destinations.evidence: The dispatcher has an explicit IMAGE/AUDIO/VIDEO branch before the unknown-precompile fallback and sends those addresses through the multimodal base validator.

equivalence_argument: Although the branch shares one base ExecutorRequest validator for the three multimodal precompiles, validate_async_payload recognizes IMAGE_CALL_PRECOMPILE, AUDIO_CALL_PRECOMPILE, and VIDEO_CALL_PRECOMPILE explicitly before fallback.
notes: This satisfies routing coverage for the current base multimodal payload semantics.
rationale: The dispatcher now explicitly recognizes the three multimodal precompile constants instead of treating them as unknown/generic payloads. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: validate_async_payload must route IMAGE_CALL_PRECOMPILE, AUDIO_CALL_PRECOMPILE, and VIDEO_CALL_PRECOMPILE to their dedicated multimodal validators before falling back to generic executor request validation.
suggested_falsification_tests: Call validate_async_payload with each multimodal precompile and inputs that trigger modality-specific DecodeFailed labels; assert the image/audio/video validators were used rather than the generic fallback.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Call validate_async_payload with each multimodal precompile and inputs that trigger modality-specific DecodeFailed labels; assert the image/audio/video validators were used rather than the generic fallback.
title: validate_async_payload routes multimodal precompiles
